ddls:
CREATE TABLE "codebases" (
  "codebase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each codebase */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the codebase */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the codebase */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the codebase was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the codebase */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager assigned to the codebase */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository where the codebase is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("codebase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "codebase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the codebase the file belongs to */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_codebase_id FOREIGN KEY ("codebase_id") REFERENCES codebases ("codebase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., Markdown, JSON, JavaScript) */,
  "language_version" TEXT /* Version of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the metric belongs to */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the metric is for */,
  "lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments */,
  "blank_lines" INTEGER /* Number of blank lines */,
  "total_lines" INTEGER /* Total number of lines */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the code */,
  "halstead_complexity" INTEGER /* Halstead complexity of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "codebase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the codebase the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the codebase */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_codebase_id FOREIGN KEY ("codebase_id") REFERENCES codebases ("codebase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the codebase */,
  "codebase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the codebase being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the codebase was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_codebase_id FOREIGN KEY ("codebase_id") REFERENCES codebases ("codebase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., Markdown, JSON, JavaScript) */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, team lead, project manager) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "codebase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the codebase */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Read access for the role */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Write access for the role */,
  "delete_access" INTEGER /* Delete access for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_codebase_id FOREIGN KEY ("codebase_id") REFERENCES codebases ("codebase_id")
)
